short_description: Theranest EHR intermittent login failures pattern
description: Root cause analysis for repeated EHR login failures after password resets. Suspected SSO token expiry issue.

short_description: Recurring Wi-Fi dropout in Occupational Therapy east wing
description: Pattern of wireless disconnections every 20-30 min in therapy rooms 102-106. Insufficient WAP density confirmed.

short_description: Theranest template corruption after version upgrades
description: Custom goal measure and NRS templates corrupted after each Theranest version upgrade. Vendor configuration issue.

short_description: REDCap export timeout affecting Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group data pipeline
description: REDCap export jobs consistently timing out above 150 records. Vendor rate limit suspected. Escalated to MCWC Chronic Pain Program SRE.

short_description: Badge access intermittent participant failure pattern
description: Honeywell participant on east wing door intermittently rejecting valid badges. Firmware defect confirmed by vendor.

short_description: Scheduling module slow on participant names with special characters
description: Reader search query degrades to 30s+ when names contain diacritics or apostrophes. Suspected unindexed LIKE query.

short_description: Theranest documentation 500 errors on MT state form save
description: Recurring internal server error saving session notes on Montana state forms. Vendor regression suspected post-upgrade.

short_description: REDCap authentication failures for pilot user group
description: Pilot users intermittently unable to authenticate to REDCap. Token refresh and credential rotation interplay under review.

short_description: Zoom Health one-way audio in remote coaching rooms
description: Microphone input not transmitting from rooms 108-110. Pattern across multiple sessions; person version defect confirmed.

short_description: ADP timeclock dropping hourly entries on sync
description: Recurring loss of hourly punch entries during nightly ADP sync. Affects payroll accuracy for multiple staff.

short_description: Occupational Therapy gym printer recurring offline state
description: HP LaserJet in room 104 repeatedly drops offline. Pattern suggests power-management or DHCP lease issue.

short_description: Endpoint security policy blocking professional peripheral software
description: Multiple professional peripheral installers (dynamometer, goniometer apps) blocked by endpoint policy. Allowlist process needed.

short_description: Outlook calendar sync failures on BRC workstations
description: Calendar sync stalls intermittently on department workstations. External MCWC Chronic Pain Program invites not appearing. M365 config suspected.

short_description: VPN connection failures from remote fieldwork site
description: Fieldwork users unable to establish VPN from the University Occupational Therapy building. Certificate or split-tunnel routing suspected.

short_description: Conference room 201 HDMI detection failures
description: Projector fails to detect HDMI input from Mac laptops. Recurring before team meetings. Switcher hardware fault suspected.

short_description: Unannounced Theranest scheduling maintenance windows
description: Vendor maintenance windows occurring without advance IT notice, causing unexpected scheduling outages. Vendor SLA review needed.

short_description: MCWC Chronic Pain Program handouts slow load tied to east wing wifi density
description: Dashboard load latency on pilot iPads correlates with weak signal in rooms 102-106. Root cause linked to WAP coverage gap.

short_description: Patterson Medical ordering portal returning 404
description: Supply-ordering portal intermittently returns 404 after vendor endpoint change. SSO and URL mapping under investigation.

short_description: Workstation imaging backlog delaying Occupational Therapy onboarding
description: Imaging queue delays repeatedly hold up new Occupational Therapy workstation provisioning. Process bottleneck in imaging pipeline.

short_description: Fieldwork student shared-drive access provisioning gaps
description: New fieldwork students repeatedly lack timely access to Occupational Therapy template folders. Onboarding ACL workflow needs standardization.
